auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Currents API key sent with the Authorization header. Log in to view or generate it from the Currents dashboard: https://currentsapi.services/en/login/.

actions.name: get_latest_news
actions.description: Retrieve the latest Currents news feed with optional language and region filters.

language.description: Comma-separated language codes used to filter the latest news feed.

country.description: Comma-separated region codes used to filter the latest news feed.

category.description: Comma-separated category values used to filter the latest news feed.

type.description: Article type filter forwarded to Currents.

domain.description: Comma-separated domains to include in the latest news feed.

domain_not.description: Comma-separated domains to exclude from the latest news feed.

page_number.description: One-based page number to request from Currents.

page_size.description: Maximum number of news articles to request from Currents.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the latest Currents news feed.

status.description: Top-level request status returned by Currents.

items.description: A single news article returned by Currents.

news.description: News articles returned by Currents for this request.

page_number.description: Current page number returned by Currents.

nextPage.description: Cursor token returned by Currents for fetching the next search page.

actions.name: list_available_categories
actions.description: List the news categories currently supported by Currents.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for listing Currents categories.

status.description: Top-level request status returned by Currents.

description.description: Human-readable description returned by Currents for this taxonomy payload.

actions.name: list_available_languages
actions.description: List the language codes currently supported by Currents.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for listing Currents languages.

status.description: Top-level request status returned by Currents.

languages.description: Language display names mapped to Currents language codes.

description.description: Human-readable description returned by Currents for this taxonomy payload.

actions.name: list_available_regions
actions.description: List the region codes currently supported by Currents.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for listing Currents regions.

status.description: Top-level request status returned by Currents.

regions.description: Region display names mapped to Currents region codes.

description.description: Human-readable description returned by Currents for this taxonomy payload.

actions.name: search_news
actions.description: Search Currents news articles with keyword, taxonomy, and time-range filters.

keywords.description: Keyword query forwarded to Currents search.

language.description: Comma-separated language codes used to filter search.

country.description: Comma-separated region codes used to filter search.

category.description: Comma-separated category values used to filter search.

start_date.description: UTC timestamp filter in ISO 8601 format, such as 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z.

end_date.description: UTC timestamp filter in ISO 8601 format, such as 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z.

type.description: Article type filter forwarded to Currents search.

domain.description: Comma-separated domains to include in the search results.

domain_not.description: Comma-separated domains to exclude from the search results.

author.description: Comma-separated author names used to filter search.

page_number.description: One-based page number to request from Currents.

page_size.description: Maximum number of news articles to request from Currents search.

cursor.description: Cursor token returned by Currents for deep pagination.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching Currents news articles.

status.description: Top-level request status returned by Currents.

items.description: A single news article returned by Currents.

news.description: News articles returned by Currents for this request.

page_number.description: Current page number returned by Currents.

nextPage.description: Cursor token returned by Currents for fetching the next search page.
